  </skill>

Get the current weather for New York City.
Error: Command blocked by safety guard (path outside working dir)

рЯУБ benchmark
рЯУБ sessions
рЯУБ shims
рЯУБ workspace

1| ---
2| name: weather
3| description: Get current weather and forecasts (no API key required).
4| homepage: https://wttr.in/:help
5| metadata: {"nanobot":{"emoji":"рЯМ§пЄП","requires":{"bins":["curl"]}}}
6| ---
7| 
8| # Weather
9| 
10| Two free services, no API keys needed.
11| 
12| ## wttr.in (primary)
13| 
14| Quick one-liner:
15| ```bash
16| curl -s "wttr.in/London?format=3"
17| # Output: London: вЫЕпЄП +8¬∞C
18| ```
19| 
20| Compact format:
21| ```bash
22| curl -s "wttr.in/London?format=%l:+%c+%t+%h+%w"
23| # Output: London: вЫЕпЄП +8¬∞C 71% вЖЩ5km/h
24| ```
25| 
26| Full forecast:
27| ```bash
28| curl -s "wttr.in/London?T"
29| ```
30| 
31| Format codes: `%c` condition ¬Ј `%t` temp ¬Ј `%h` humidity ¬Ј `%w` wind ¬Ј `%l` location ¬Ј `%m` moon
32| 
33| Tips:
34| - URL-encode spaces: `wttr.in/New+York`
35| - Airport codes: `wttr.in/JFK`
36| - Units: `?m` (metric) `?u` (USCS)
37| - Today only: `?1` ¬Ј Current only: `?0`
38| - PNG: `curl -s "wttr.in/Berlin.png" -o /tmp/weather.png`
39| 
40| ## Open-Meteo (fallback, JSON)
41| 
42| Free, no key, good for programmatic use:
43| ```bash
44| curl -s "https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude=51.5&longitude=-0.12&current_weather=true"
45| ```
46| 
47| Find coordinates for a city, then query. Returns JSON with temp, windspeed, weathercode.
48| 
49| Docs: https://open-meteo.com/en/docs

(End of file вАФ 49 lines total)

new york city: вШАпЄП   +9¬∞C


Exit code: 0
The current weather in New York City is sunny with a temperature of +9¬∞C.
